title: Section 25
content: The provisions of this Act, or the rules made thereunder shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of, 1[the Food Safety and Standards Act, 2006], or the rules made thereunder.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 34 of 2006, s. 100, for "the Prevention of Food Adulteration Act, 1954 (37 of 1954)" (w.e.f. 29-7-2010).
